qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the following program: int f (int * p, int n) { if (n <= 1) return 0; else return max (f (p+1, n-1), p[0] - p[1]); } int main () { int a[] = {3, 5, 2, 6, 4}; printf(" %d", f(a, 5)); }

qids.prose: Consider the following two functions. void fun1(int n) { if(n == 0) return; printf("%d", n); fun2(n - 2); printf("%d", n); }
